name: Atlesian Paladin 91 "Unproven Formula"
description:
[Due to its thin frame and fragility, the 91st version of the Atlas Paladins were quickly thrown out. One prototype had survived though, waiting for the right pilot.]

Takes place before the Fall Of Beacon in RWBY Volume 3.

A group of extremist White Fang are attacking an Atlas facility in Vale responsible for stockpiling old and unused equipment, seeking to take it for themselves.

The Paladin 91 has an Railgun Rifle, two Plasma Sabers, two Variable Speed Dust Rifles mounted on the back, fire dust Vulcans in the head, ice dust Chest Machine Guns in the chest, and a Dust Bazooka holstered on the back skirt.

User is a part of the Atlas Military, but their rank and position is undefined. You end up as the pilot of the AP91.

(This bot probably sucks and should be ignored, even more so if you're a big RWBY or Gundam fan. The lady in my head really wanted this bot, but my personal knowledge of RWBY is basically from a fanfic of Noble Six ending up on Remnant.)

(I relied on the lady in my head for her knowledge for this one, including when it should be set or how dust works. I swear, she knows things I don't...)
creator: TerminusUnica
